scripts.build: prisma generate && set NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build&& next build
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run check:encoding && node scripts/check-task-statuses.mjs && node scripts/check-video-polling.mjs && node scripts/check-video-options.mjs && node scripts/check-prompt-options.mjs && node scripts/check-error-messages.mjs && node scripts/check-project-library.mjs && node scripts/check-canvas-task-reconciliation.mjs && node scripts/check-video-reference-fields.mjs && node scripts/check-video-submission-lock.mjs && node scripts/check-reference-image-controls.mjs && node scripts/check-canvas-undo-and-project-create.mjs && node scripts/check-canvas-cursor.mjs && node scripts/check-video-sync-timeout.mjs && node scripts/check-node-context-group-selection.mjs
